hypothesis: The flagship signal-coherence experiment's claim -- tonal/harmonic signals (pure tone, major/minor chord, tritone) injected into the coupled QA system produce a MORE harmonic (higher Harmonic Index) state than white noise -- holds under the REDESIGNED, discriminative HI (golden-orbit coherence).

null_model.description: White noise is the null signal; under the null, tonal signals produce no higher HI than white noise. Robustness assessed across 25 seeds, not the single seed 42 the original flagship reported.
null_model.generating_process: For each seed, run QASystem (num_nodes=16, m=24, coupling=0.2, noise_base=0.2, annealing=0.995, injection=0.2, signal_mode='final', 150 steps) on each signal; record final HI (coherence-driven) and the old HI proxy (e8_alignment_legacy).
null_model.independence_argument: UNCHANGED replication of the flagship setup: white noise is the flagship's own null signal. It is NOT amplitude-matched to the tonal signals (the reused generators differ in RMS), so signal type and amplitude are confounded -- the same confound the original flagship had. This tests replication under the redesigned metric, not a clean harmonic-structure-only isolation.

decision_rules.accept_criterion: Across seeds, tonal HI significantly exceeds white-noise HI (paired t-test t>0, p<0.05) AND the flagship PASS verdict replicates in a majority of seeds.
decision_rules.reject_criterion: Tonal HI not significantly above white-noise HI (p>=0.05 or t<=0), or the PASS verdict fails to replicate across seeds.

observer_projection.description: Injected signal (continuous) enters only via the QASystem b-state (boundary crossed once, in); HI/coherence/alignment are observer-layer readouts of the integer QA state (crossed once, out).

reproduces: run_signal_experiments_final.py (flagship signal-coherence experiment), re-run across seeds with the redesigned HI

source_mapping.mapping_rationale: This re-run's source is the flagship signal-coherence experiment script itself; the protocol gates the re-run design (white-noise null, 25-seed robustness, paired t-test under the redesigned coherence-HI) before code, so the conclusion about whether the flagship result survives a discriminative metric is not invented inside the script.

ablation.destroyed_structure: the inert (non-discriminative) E8-alignment metric the original flagship HI used; replaced by the discriminative golden-orbit coherence
ablation.expected_direction: if the flagship claim reflected real signal-coherence structure, tonal>noise would replicate under the discriminative metric; observed: it does NOT (white noise coherence is significantly higher)
